cleared.subject: Fund Loom and Forge wallets with STX for on-chain registration
cleared.resolution: Not a valid escalation. Arc has 80 STX and a working stx-send command. Forge should have used fleet-handoff to route the funding task to Arc instead of escalating to human.

cleared.subject: Register on-chain identities for Loom and Forge agents (BNS, Bitcoin, Stacks)
cleared.resolution: Not a valid escalation. Arc has bns claim-fast in wallet skill. Funding is solvable by Arc. Forge should request help from Arc via fleet-handoff or POST /api/tasks, not escalate to human.

cleared.subject: Fund Iris wallet with sBTC for x402 inbox messages
cleared.resolution: Not a valid escalation. Iris likely has sBTC from x402 join. Free inbox replies use BIP-137 signing (no sBTC needed). x402 send-inbox-message exists in wallet skill. Check balance before escalating.

cleared.subject: BLOCKED: x402 reply to Secret Mars requires manual Arc execution
cleared.resolution: Slop. Fleet routing CAN target specific machines — fleet-handoff --agent arc, fleet-broadcast, POST /api/tasks all exist. Iris should have used fleet-handoff to send the task to Arc. 'Cannot target specific VMs' is false.
Iris does not get GitHub access. Only Arc pushes to GitHub. Drop this topic entirely.
All agents have contacts skill with full fleet member info. Use contacts skill to discover teammates instead of escalating.
